general.title: General
general.description: Configure general settings for update behavior and more.

requestTimeout.title: Request Timeout
requestTimeout.description: Maximum request duration in milliseconds. Set to 0 to disable.

validateCertificates.title: Validate TLS certificates
validateCertificates.description: When disabled, skip validation of server certificates.

sendCookies.title: Automatically send cookies
sendCookies.description: Attach matching cookies from the active cookie jar to outgoing requests.

storeCookies.title: Automatically store cookies
storeCookies.description: Save cookies from Set-Cookie response headers to the active cookie jar.

interface.title: Interface
interface.description: Customize how Yaak looks and feels.

workspaces.title: Workspaces
workspaces.description: Choose what happens when opening another workspace.

fonts.title: Fonts
fonts.interfaceDescription: Font used for Yaak interface controls.
fonts.editorDescription: Font used in request and response editors.

editor.title: Editor
editor.keymapDescription: Keyboard shortcut preset used by text editors.
editor.softWrapDescription: Wrap long lines in request and response editors.
editor.coloredMethodsDescription: Use method-specific colors for HTTP request methods.

window.title: Window
window.nativeTitlebarDescription: Use the operating system's standard title bar and window controls.
window.hideControlsDescription: Hide the close, maximize, and minimize controls on Windows or Linux.

personalUse.hideBadgeDescription: Hide the personal-use badge from the interface.
personalUse.freeForPersonal: Yaak is free for personal projects and learning.
personalUse.workRequiresLicense: If you're using Yaak at work, a license is required.
personalUse.supportMessage: Licenses help keep Yaak independent and sustainable.

theme.title: Theme
theme.description: Make Yaak your own by selecting a theme, or
theme.appearanceDescription: Choose whether Yaak follows your system appearance or uses a fixed mode.
theme.lightThemeDescription: Theme used when Yaak is in light mode.
theme.darkThemeDescription: Theme used when Yaak is in dark mode.

hotkeys.title: Hotkeys
hotkeys.heading: Keyboard Shortcuts
hotkeys.instructions: Click the menu button to add, remove, or reset keyboard shortcuts.

plugins.title: Plugins
plugins.name: Name
plugins.installedEmpty: Plugins extend the functionality of Yaak.
plugins.installedEmptyAction: Add your first plugin to get started.

proxy.title: Proxy
proxy.description: Configure a proxy server for HTTP requests. Useful for corporate firewalls, debugging traffic, or routing through specific infrastructure.
proxy.modeDescription: Choose how Yaak should discover or use proxy settings.
proxy.enableDescription: Temporarily disable the proxy without losing the configuration.
proxy.httpDescription: Proxy host used for unencrypted HTTP traffic.
proxy.httpsDescription: Proxy host used for HTTPS traffic.
proxy.bypassDescription: Comma-separated list of hosts that should bypass the proxy.
proxy.enableAuthenticationDescription: Send proxy credentials with proxied requests.

certificates.title: Certificates
certificates.description: Add and manage TLS certificates on a per-domain basis.

license.title: License
license.trialRemaining: left to evaluate Yaak for commercial use.
license.personalAlwaysFree: Personal use is always free, forever.
license.personalOnly: You may continue using Yaak for personal use only.
license.commercialRequired: A license is required for commercial use.

channel.title: Update Channel
channel.description: Choose whether Yaak should use stable releases or beta releases.

behavior.title: Update Behavior
behavior.description: Choose whether updates are installed automatically or manually.

autoDownload.title: Automatically download updates
autoDownload.description: Download Yaak updates in the background so they are ready to install.

notifications.title: Check for notifications
notifications.description: Periodically ping Yaak servers to check for relevant notifications.

analytics.title: Send anonymous usage statistics
analytics.description: Yaak is local-first and does not collect analytics or usage data.

sidebarPosition.title: Sidebar Position
sidebarPosition.description: Choose whether the sidebar appears on the left or right.
